prompt:
A knee-length white cotton lab coat hanging on a wooden peg or hook against a softly lit wall, the fabric slightly textured and natural-looking. The coat has snap buttons down the front, two large lower pockets, and a smaller chest pocket, with the sleeves rolled once at the cuffs to suggest a comfortable, one-size-fits-most garment. A simple stethoscope or pen peeks from one pocket, hinting at scientific or medical work without being specific.

Near-future solarpunk lab aesthetic with warm, indirect lighting, a few plants nearby, and hints of clean lab benches or glassware in soft focus. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering, no brand logos, name tags, or legible text on the coat. The composition should make the lab coat feel like a ready-to-wear, practical inventory item.
